description: CE migration: asset_type_registry tenant table (greenfield-Citus pattern: tenant first, distribute inline, transaction:false); unique (tenant, slug); no RLS (post-20260509 architecture)
Migration seeds six built-ins for existing tenants; tenant-onboarding path seeds them for future tenants (standard_statuses lesson)
fields_schema contract + validation: field {key, label, kind: text|number|date|select|url|boolean, required?, options?}; key rules; select needs options
Registry model: list/get/create/update/delete; slug generation + reserved-slug collision guard; delete blocked while assets use the slug; built-ins immutable schema (name/icon editable)
Server actions for registry CRUD gated by asset.update (read by asset.read); typed result envelopes
Settings > Asset Types page: registry list (built-ins flagged), create/edit drawer, delete with in-use guard messaging
Schema editor in the drawer: add/remove/reorder field rows, kind picker, required toggle, select options editor
Asset create/edit type selects source the registry (built-ins + custom) instead of the hardcoded six
Custom-type selected -> schema-driven fields panel renders; values read/write assets.attributes[key]; required enforcement; built-in types keep extension panels untouched
createAsset/updateAsset accept custom slugs (validated against registry) and attributes payload for schema fields
Asset list + filters render custom types (registry label/icon); type filter options from registry
Asset detail renders the custom type's schema fields panel (read view) alongside existing panels
Asset dashboard by-type breakdowns include custom types with registry labels
Asset reporting/export surfaces resolve custom type labels via the registry
Hudu layout map type select sources the registry (custom types targetable); resolver returns slugs
'Create type from this layout': fetch layout field definitions, generate slug/name/fields_schema, persist type + layout assignment in one action
Import onto a custom type projects Hudu field values onto matching schema keys (normalized label) in addition to hudu_fields
All new strings keyed via t() with en + de/es/fr/it/nl/pl/pt entries; static scans extended where applicable
RBAC sweep: registry actions enforce asset.update/read; built-in six behave exactly as before (extension tables, forms, existing tests green)
Citus smoke: migration applies cleanly on a Citus-enabled chain (distribution + colocation verified; no RLS per post-20260509 architecture)
